data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of including a photo/video release within the same form as part of the liability waiver. However, the evidence provided does not confirm that this requirement is met, as it only mentions the inclusion of a photo/video release without demonstrating its actual implementation or functionality. The linked use case explicitly states the need for a photo/video release within the same form, indicating a clear gap in meeting this requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of photo/video release within the same form.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
